theme.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Premium Agency Dark Mode
theme.rationale: An OS for a video editing agency requires a dark, command-center feel that minimizes eye strain while allowing vibrant media assets to pop. High-contrast elements establish authority and clarity for data metrics.

rules: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans for headings. Use Outfit.
Never center headings by default. Left-align for dashboards.
Use JetBrains Mono for metrics, numbers, and code-like data.
No full-screen gradients. Use pure stark dark backgrounds.
Interactive elements must have high contrast on hover.
Never use #000000; stick to tinted deep grays like Zinc-950 (#09090B).

layout.spacing_system: Control Room Grid. Use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for dashboards. Every pixel must be utilized.
layout.border_radius: Max 8px (rounded-md) for subtle roundness. Avoid fully pill-shaped buttons unless it's a specific badge.
layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton for the dashboard. Cards should have 1px solid border (border-white/10) with flat backgrounds. Glassmorphism only for sticky headers/modals (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl).
rules: Mobile-first responsive grids. Always start with grid-cols-1.
Containers with borders must use internal padding (p-4 or p-6) to prevent text collision.
Override default stretch behavior on grid with align-items: start when necessary.

components.navigation: Sidebar navigation (w-64) on desktop, hidden behind hamburger on mobile. Must have active state highlights (bg-white/5 border-l-2 border-white).
components.cards: Cardless or flat cards with 1px border-white/10. No heavy box-shadows in dark mode. On hover: -translate-y-1 and border-white/20.
components.kanban: Columns should have a subtle background (bg-zinc-900/50). Cards should have border-white/10. Implement smooth scroll. Status colors: Active (Green), Pending (Yellow), Revision (Red).
components.metrics: Use large JetBrains Mono for numbers. Include small Red/Yellow/Green trend arrows next to them based on performance.
components.chat: Discord-style: list of users on left, chat stream on right. Use neon colored badges for roles (Admin: Red, Editor: Blue, Client: Gray).
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Inputs must have border-white/10 and focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/20. No native HTML inputs.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800.

rules: Hover states for ALL interactive elements.
Staggered entrance for Kanban cards and Leaderboard rows.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='kanban-column-active').

images.description: Abstract elegant black satin fabric for the login page hero background.
Cyberpunk neon portrait for anonymous editor.
Cyberpunk neon portrait for anonymous editor.
Cyberpunk neon portrait for anonymous editor.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts sonner clsx tailwind-merge`.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for grid layout structures. Only use Shadcn for interactive logic (Dialogs, Selects, Dropdowns).
Kanban board: Ensure items are wrapped in a generic layout. Implement drag and drop visually.
All javascript files must be used for components. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx). Use .jsx or .js
Embed `data-testid` in EVERY actionable item (Buttons, links, inputs).
Strictly follow the color codes for performance metrics: Green >= 90%, Yellow 70-89%, Red < 70%.
Render the online status as an absolute positioned green dot (bg-emerald-500) on the bottom right of the Avatar.
For avatars, use rounded squares for Anime editors and full circles for Clients/Admins to distinguish roles visually.
